parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: "user", content: [{ type: "image_url", image_url: { url: "data:image/jpeg;base64," + $json.base64.substring(0, 500000), detail: "low" } }, { type: "text", text: "Is this a Zelle payment receipt? If YES extract: amount (number), reference, date, sender name. Respond JSON ONLY: {\"is_zelle\": true, \"amount\": 45, \"reference\": \"ABC123\", \"date\": \"2026-04-17\", \"sender_name\": \"John\"}. If NOT: {\"is_zelle\": false}" }] }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'confirmado', payment_method: 'zelle', amount_paid_usd: $('Z: Build payload').first().json.amount }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", max_tokens: 600, messages: [{ role: "user", content: [{ type: "image_url", image_url: { url: "data:image/jpeg;base64," + $json.base64.substring(0, 500000), detail: "low" } }, { type: "text", text: "Analyze this payment receipt image. Determine the payment type and extract details.

Payment types to detect:
1. ZELLE - US bank transfer (look for Zelle logo, confirmation number, USD amount)
2. PAGO_MOVIL - Venezuelan mobile payment (look for banco, cedula, referencia, monto in Bs)
3. BINANCE - Crypto payment (look for Binance logo, USDT, order ID)
4. TRANSFERENCIA - Venezuelan bank transfer (look for banco, referencia, monto in Bs)

Respond with JSON ONLY, no markdown:
{"payment_type": "zelle|pago_movil|binance|transferencia|unknown", "amount": number, "currency": "USD|BS|USDT", "reference": "string or null", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null", "sender_name": "string or null", "bank": "string or null"}

If not a payment receipt: {"payment_type": "unknown"}" }] }] }) }}
